summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Hui Fenua FENUA PULSE features - Interactive map with islands, markers, Mana gamification, and vendor/roulotte system. All 17 features tested successfully with 23/24 backend tests passing.

issues: Minor: Create signal button could have clearer tooltip for new users

passed_tests: ✅ API: /api/pulse/islands returns 7 islands (Tahiti, Moorea, Bora-Bora, Huahine, Raiatea, Marquises, Tuamotu)
✅ API: /api/pulse/marker-types returns 8 marker types (roulotte, accident, surf, event, live, weather, market, other)
✅ API: /api/pulse/status returns pulse status (emoji, text, level, color, active_count)
✅ API: /api/pulse/markers returns active markers list
✅ API: /api/pulse/leaderboard returns weekly leaderboard
✅ API: /api/pulse/badges returns all available badges
✅ API: /api/pulse/stats returns fenua statistics
✅ API: /api/pulse/mana returns user's mana balance (requires auth)
✅ API: /api/roulotte/cuisine-types returns 12 cuisine types
✅ API: /api/roulotte/payment-methods returns payment options (cash, card, etc.)
✅ API: /api/roulotte/search returns vendor search results
✅ API: /api/roulotte/open returns currently open roulottes
✅ API: /api/posts/paginated returns paginated posts with has_more
✅ UI: Login with email/password works correctly
✅ UI: Feed page displays posts with lazy loading (20 posts shown)
✅ UI: Pulse page - Map loads with Leaflet (CartoDB Voyager tiles)
✅ UI: Pulse page - Map centered on Tahiti (shows PAPEETE)
✅ UI: Pulse page - All island navigation buttons visible and functional
✅ UI: Pulse page - Island navigation changes map view (tested Moorea, Bora Bora)
✅ UI: Pulse page - All marker type filter buttons displayed
✅ UI: Pulse page - Pulse status indicator shows emoji + text
✅ UI: Pulse page - Mana balance displays (shows 0 Mana for test user)
✅ UI: Pulse page - Create signal button opens modal (requires GPS)
✅ UI: Vendor page - Dashboard loads for non-vendor user
✅ UI: Vendor page - 'Créer mon profil vendeur' button visible
✅ UI: Vendor page - Info cards displayed (Soyez visible, Notifiez vos clients, Collectez des avis)
✅ UI: Navigation - Pulse tab visible in left sidebar
✅ UI: Navigation - 'Ma Roulotte' link in right sidebar
context_for_next_testing_agent: All FENUA PULSE features tested and working. Backend APIs fully functional. Frontend map integration with Leaflet working properly. Island navigation, marker filters, Mana display all verified. Vendor dashboard displays correctly for non-vendor users. The only minor issue is a test file using wrong endpoint path /api/pulse/my-badges instead of /api/pulse/badges/me.
